title: Minky SureGrip Pegs, Assorted color, Pack of 24
features: SOFT GRIP - Made with a unique firm but gentle grip, they firmly secure your fabrics without leaving any unwanted imprints. These pegs provide the perfect balance of strength and gentleness.
WEATHERPROOF - Designed to resist fading and deterioration from sun exposure, these UV stable pegs are perfect for all your outdoor drying needs, ensuring long-lasting performance.
ANTI-TWIST CONSTRUCTION - These pegs are specially designed to stay intact and prevent splitting during use. Made with premium materials, they offer superior strength and durability.
WIDE JAW - Specifically designed to hold thicker items without losing their grip. With their ergonomic shape and sturdy construction, they provide exceptional support.
BRIGHT COLOURS - Available in blue, purple, green, and pink, these pegs are not only practical but also stylish. With their sleek design and superior functionality, these pegs are a must-have.
description: From the manufacturer Established in the UK in 1941, Minky Homecare are world leaders in laundry hardware and textile manufacture. Minky is the UK’s leading brand in the laundry market, with Minky ironing boards and covers found in over 70% of UK homes. We are the proud holders of both the Royal Warrant, granted as supplier of premium quality products to the Royal Household, and the Princes Warrant, awarded for product excellence and a commitment to the environment. 24 Sure Grip Pegs Minky Sure Grip pegs protect your laundry from blowing away, with a firm but gentle grip that helps reduce peg marks on your fabrics. Unique Anti-Twist construction prevents the pegs splitting apart in use. They have a wide jaw for thicker items and are UV stable in the sun. Strong and Waterproof Firm Grip - with gentle, anti-marking pads Rust resistant coil springs
